description.short: Decision support: second opinion, risk, bias, tradeoffs, pre-mortem, red team.
description.full: Decision Duck brings opinionated decision-support workflows into Copilot Cowork: ask for a second opinion, run structured risk analysis, spot cognitive biases, compare options with tradeoffs, work through a pre-mortem, run an adversarial red team review, see a decision through a specific stakeholder lens, and produce a full decision brief. Backed by a remote MCP server protected by Microsoft Entra OAuth. Knowledge skills expose a library of decision frameworks (RICE, OODA, Eisenhower, Bezos one/two-way doors, and more).

agentConnectors.description: Decision-support tools: second opinion, risk analysis, cognitive bias detection, comparative analysis, pre-mortem, red team, stakeholder analysis, and a decision-framework library. Backed by a remote MCP server protected by Microsoft Entra OAuth.
